fields.name: order_datetime_company
fields.definition: Order timestamp converted from customer timezone to company timezone.

fields.name: is_first_order
fields.definition: True when an order is the first observed order for a buyer.

fields.name: is_black_friday
fields.definition: Flag for orders placed on Black Friday in company timezone (America/Chicago). Black Friday = Friday following Thanksgiving.

fields.name: referral_discount_amount
fields.definition: Discount amount from referral promotion (10% on first order only). Not applied if Black Friday discount is higher.
fields.formula: order_base_revenue * 0.10 when (is_referred==1 AND is_first_order==True AND referral_discount > black_friday_discount)

fields.name: black_friday_discount_amount
fields.definition: Discount amount from Black Friday promotion (20%). Takes precedence over referral discount (max applied, not cumulative).

fields.name: order_base_revenue
fields.definition: Gross merchandise revenue before discounts and shipping.

fields.name: order_net_revenue_before_shipping
fields.definition: Revenue after discounts, before shipping fees.

fields.name: customer_shipping_fee
fields.definition: Shipping fee charged to customer based on order value tiers.

fields.name: company_shipping_cost
fields.definition: Flat shipping cost paid by company per order.

fields.name: order_revenue
fields.definition: Net order revenue including customer shipping fee.

fields.name: order_profit
fields.definition: Order profit after COGS and company shipping cost.
